name: Stacey Abrams
subject: An update from the road
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
I'm in the middle of our statewide "Jobs for Georgia" tour, but I wanted to send you a quick update from the road. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa96c/34a064cc/a7e5622/70e9d08/3134923062/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Dear Friends - Right now, our campaign for progress is in overdrive. The eyes of the nation are on Georgia, but my focus is unchanged: Talking with Georgians about our shared values, our futures together, and my comprehensive plans to address the challenges we face. I'm in the middle of our statewide "Jobs for Georgia" tour, but I wanted to send you a quick update from the road. We're traveling the state, talking about infrastructure, apprenticeships, and support for small businesses. More importantly, we're meeting folks where they live. **[Help keep our campaign on the road. Chip in $3 or whatever you can to bring our "Jobs for Georgia" tour directly to Georgia voters.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa96c/34a064cc/a7e5622/70e9d09/3134923062/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODAyMTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-august?refcode=IE080218-full")** **[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa96c/34a064cc/a7e5622/70e9d09/3134923062/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODAyMTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-august?refcode=IE080218-full")** Traveling in Hinesville, I met Keith and Clay. Five years ago, they had a vision for a solar company. Since then, their team - which includes army veterans and folks committed to expanding the use of renewables in our state - has helped Georgia farmers and small business owners install solar panels. On top of the clear environmental benefits, solar power has helped rural businesses grow by cutting overhead and utility costs. Keith and Clay are Republicans, and I'm a proud Democrat. But our core values are the same, and we all want what's best for our state and our families. As Keith said, "the common ground for most of us is our pocket book at the end of the day." He's right. Coastal Solar has helped rural business owners keep more money in their pocket books. That money can be used to expand, hire another employee, or even put a kid through school. As a small businesswoman myself, I know that a thousand dollars saved every month can be life changing - and a great return on investment. **[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa96c/34a064cc/a7e5622/70e9d09/3134923062/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODAyMTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-august?refcode=IE080218-full")** **Everything we fight for should have a return on investment for Georgians.** Because when we invest in public schools, in health care, and in economic development, we yield not only good jobs, but also better wages and improved lives. Thank you, Keith, Clay, Mike, Suzanne, and everyone at Coastal Solar for this important conversation. My goal is to continue having conversations about jobs in all 159 counties, because Georgia's next governor can - and must - use the diversity of industry to build good jobs where people live. **[That is our focus, and we're just getting started. Will you help us continue having conversations about jobs and economic development across Georgia?](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa96c/34a064cc/a7e5622/70e9d09/3134923062/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODAyMTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-august?refcode=IE080218-full")** This campaign is about stories, not slogans. It's about people like Keith and Clay who are fighting for their families, their communities, and their state. And it's about electing leaders with bold plans who they know will fight by their side. I have to run, but we'll talk again soon. Best, Stacey
---
**[DONATE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa96c/34a064cc/a7e5622/70e9d09/3134923062/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODAyMTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-august?refcode=IE080218-full")**

name: Holly Rakoci
subject: We need your help!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee
body:
| | | I need your help to get Tiffany across the finish line. Hello Friend, My name is Holly and I am the Shedd Campaign's new Political Director. That means I am in charge of helping to spread Tiffany's message on the ground and throughout the district. Tiffany has gained a ton of momentum and the polls prove it, but there is still more work to be done! I need your help to get Tiffany across the finish line. | | [Sign up to volunteer today!](http://email.connectstrategic.com/t/j-l-ndymiy-jriylrtihd-y/)
---
Every Saturday until August 28th we will be hosting a phone bank in Eloy from 9:00 a.m. - 1:00 p.m., and I need as many volunteers as possible to help spread the word about Tiffany's campaign!
Can I count on you to sign up to volunteer today?
| [Sign up to volunteer on Saturdays in Eloy!](mailto:holly@sheddforcongress.com?body=Name%3A%20%0AEmail%3A%20%0APhone%3A%20%0AAvailability%3A&subject=Volunteering%20on%20Saturdays!)
---
Don't live in Eloy? Don't worry! We can set you up to make phone calls right from your home, wherever you may live.
Can't work on Saturdays? We got you covered! You can make calls from your home any day of the week.
| [Sign up to make calls from home now!](mailto:holly@sheddforcongress.com?body=Name%3A%20%0AEmail%3A%20%0APhone%20Number%3A%20%0AAvailability%3A&subject=Volunteering%20from%20home)
---
Rather talk to people in person? Help out the Shedd Team by knocking doors in your neighborhood. Neighbors listen to neighbors.
| [Sign up to knock doors today!](mailto:holly@sheddforcongress.com?body=Name%3A%20%0AEmail%3A%20%0APhone%20Number%3A%20%0AAvailability%3A&subject=Door%20Knocking)
---
For information on how to volunteer for our team, email me at [holly@sheddforcongress.com](mailto:holly@sheddforcongress.com).
Thank you being apart of Team Shedd! Let's get Tiffany elected and finally bring real representation to rural Arizona.
Holly Rakoci
PS: We also have some great events coming up throughout the district! If you would like to help out with one of these events just shoot me a note on email!
**Saddlebrooke Ranch Meet and Greet:**
Thursday, August 2
4:00 p.m. - 6:00 p.m.
La Hacienda Room
**Eagar Days:**
Saturday, August 4
9 a.m. - 4 p.m.
Ramsey Park
115 N. Butler St
Eagar, AZ
**Williams Meet & Greet:**
Friday, August 10
6:00 p.m. - 8:00 p.m.
Wild West Junction
321 E Rte 66
Williams, AZ 86046

name: Bob =?UTF-8?Q?Fertik=2C=20Democrats=2Ecom?=
subject: He chose Putin over our national security. We need to impeach.
body:
Activist -

We just can’t wait any longer.

There have been no less than 35 indictments in Special Counsel Robert Mueller’s investigation into Russia election interference in 2016. Five have pled guilty so far. Yet Donald Trump is still publicly siding with Vladimir Putin -- a known tyrant -- against our nation’s own intelligence agencies and democratic institutions.

There’s a word for Donald Trump’s appalling behavior: treason.

Too many members of Congress on both sides of the aisle are trying to avoid calling out our compromised president. That’s why over 5.5 million Americans have already joined together to demand Congress impeach Trump before he completely destroys our democracy. Are you in?

The integrity of our democracy is hanging in the balance. Show you’re in today: Yes, I will stand with Need To Impeach and demand accountability for President Trump. (https://www.needtoimpeach.com/impeach-trump-putin-lb/?utm_source=partner&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=demsdotcom-list-rental&utm_content=nti-lb_trump-putin)

Refusing to stand up to a dictator who directed a cyber-attack against American democracy in 2016 -- and experts say may be directing another attack right now -- is just the latest impeachable offense Trump stands guilty of.

Donald Trump has brought us to the brink of nuclear war, obstructed justice, and a federal judge ruled that a lawsuit claiming that he violated the Emoluments Clause of the U.S. Constitution by accepting money from foreign governments should move forward. And he’s already lining up more closed-door meetings with Putin -- betraying our nation right before our eyes.

The time to impeach this dangerous president is now.

We can’t wait any longer. Stand with Need To Impeach and help demand the impeachment of this compromised and dangerous president. (https://www.needtoimpeach.com/impeach-trump-putin-lb/?utm_source=partner&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=demsdotcom-list-rental&utm_content=nti-lb_trump-putin)

As the evidence of Trump’s Russia collusion piles up, more and more people are signing on to this movement. But we don’t need to wait for more evidence to know that our very democracy is in danger as long as Trump stays in office.

Thank you,

Tom Steyer
If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please visit this link:
http://demolinks.us/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvMzU4LzAvNmQyYjUzMWYyNDIzMDVlZjBlYTdjNDEyODZkMzM3MWUvMjI0Nzc1OTY3

Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

body:

subject: the bottom line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friends, my friend Sen. Martin Heinrich in New Mexico is facing an uphill battle this November - the GOP is going all-in to win this Senate seat, and he has a new opponent preparing to jump into the race.

**The bottom line: Democrats can 't take a _single_ state for granted in the fight for Senate control. **

NBC News calls Martin a key voice in Congress - and if we're going to have _any_ chance at flipping the Senate blue in 2018, we need to reelect Democrats like Martin who aren't afraid to go up against Donald Trump.
**I know just how strong this network of grassroots supporters is - you powered me to victory in 2014 - so now, I'm depending on you to help send $12,000 to Martin Heinrich's campaign and keep New Mexico blue:**
_[**Please, donate $5 - or whatever you can before midnight - to help Martin Heinrich win in New Mexico and take back the Senate for Democrats this November:**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4mth?refcode=jtk873-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)_
__If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be evenly split between Martin Heinrich and Jeanne Shaheen:__ **[Click to donate $5.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4mth?refcode=jtk873-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5)** **[Click to donate $25.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4mth?refcode=jtk873-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25)** **[Click to donate $50.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4mth?refcode=jtk873-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50)** **[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4mth?refcode=jtk873-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
Thank you for stepping up today,
Jeanne

name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: The cost of prescription drugs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hello,

One thing I hear over and over again from Minnesotans is that the cost of prescription drugs is much too high -- and families are hurting. A few years ago, I called out the makers of EpiPens when the cost of this life-saving drug shot up nearly 500 percent. Because people took action, the price of EpiPens has been cut in half.

But our work is far from done. The prices of four out of the top ten drugs have gone up by 100 percent in the last few years.

Tackling this issue in the Senate is one of my top priorities, and one of my bills that could help is the **Preserve Access to Affordable Generics Act.** This bill would crack down on a practice known as "pay for delay," where big brand-name pharmaceutical companies pay off generic manufacturers to keep less expensive products off the market. **Stopping this ridiculous practice would save taxpayers $2.9 billion.**

We need to get this bill to come for a vote and personal stories are going to be key. So I'm coming to you. **Have you or your family ever had a hard time affording a medication because it was priced too high? I 'm asking you to submit your story so I can share it with my fellow senators.**
**[Submit your story](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=QUxA4eGJYc2vW6xwEAxAowM8D8%2FYcQew)**
Thank you for sharing your story. I know that together, we'll be able to secure lower prescription drug prices for our families.

\-- Amy

clean_body: Hello, One thing I hear over and over again from Minnesotans is that the cost of prescription drugs is much too high -- and families are hurting. A few years ago, I called out the makers of EpiPens when the cost of this life-saving drug shot up nearly 500 percent. Because people took action, the price of EpiPens has been cut in half. But our work is far from done. The prices of four out of the top ten drugs have gone up by 100 percent in the last few years. Tackling this issue in the Senate is one of my top priorities, and one of my bills that could help is the Preserve Access to Affordable Generics Act. This bill would crack down on a practice known as "pay for delay," where big brand-name pharmaceutical companies pay off generic manufacturers to keep less expensive products off the market. Stopping this ridiculous practice would save taxpayers $2.9 billion. We need to get this bill to come for a vote and personal stories are going to be key. So I'm coming to you. Have you or your family ever had a hard time affording a medication because it was priced too high? I 'm asking you to submit your story so I can share it with my fellow senators. Thank you for sharing your story. I know that together, we'll be able to secure lower prescription drug prices for our families. \-- Amy **

name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: New today: Unemployment dips to 3.9%
body:
| |
---
The White House • August 3, 2018
# New today: Unemployment dips to 3.9%
**The American economy** is continuing its longest monthly streak of positive job growth in history, with 3.9 million jobs added since President Donald J. Trump was elected. **Today marks just the eighth time since 1970** that unemployment has fallen below 4 percent—with three of those occasions occurring in 2018. This success is good news for everyone, but it’s crucial for communities that have struggled historically: The unemployment rate for Hispanics has reached another all-time low, and unemployment for individuals with less than a high school diploma fell to its lowest mark since the series began in 1992. **Just as important** : Jobs are paying better. Significant wage gains had been a missing piece of the economic “recovery” since the Great Recession, CNBC reports, but that reality is changing under President Trump. “Compensation for workers rose to a nearly 10-year high in the second quarter,” Jeff Cox writes. **[The longest job streak in American history keeps going strong.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODAzLjkzMzEyNTAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgwMy45MzMxMjUwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzY0Mzk4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/longest-consecutive-positive-monthly-job-growth-u-s-history/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)** **CNBC** :[ **‘Worker pay rate hits highest level since 2008’**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODAzLjkzMzEyNTAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgwMy45MzMxMjUwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzY0Mzk4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/cnbc-worker-pay-rate-hits-highest-level-since-2008/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)
## In photos: Fallen American soldiers come home
**Sixty-five years ago last week** , an armistice brought the Korean War to its close. Many of our soldiers returned home, but more than 8,000 American troops were simply listed as “missing” and never came back. **The remains of 55 of those Service Members** arrived on American soil in Hawaii this week. Vice President Mike Pence was there to honor them. [**In Photos: 65 Years Later, Fallen American Soldiers of the Korean War Come Home**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODAzLjkzMzEyNTAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgwMy45MzMxMjUwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzY0Mzk4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/photos-65-years-later-fallen-american-soldiers-korean-war-come-home/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)
# The facts on Russia and election security
**The media talks a lot** about Russian meddling and election security, but they don’t talk much about what President Trump is actually doing to confront it. Here are just a few of his Administration’s recent actions to protect the integrity of our elections:
> • The President chaired National Security Council meetings on May 3 and July 27 to coordinate his whole-of-government approach to election security.
> • In March 2018, the Administration imposed sanctions against 16 Russian entities and individuals for their roles in interference in the 2016 election.
> • The Department of Homeland Security is working with all 50 states, local governments, and the private sector to bolster defense against cyber operations targeting voting.
> • The Administration provided on-site cybersecurity support to states during the 2017 elections.
> • The Justice Department and FBI continue to investigate and disrupt any threats to election systems, while alerting potential victims and targets.
[**How President Trump is strengthening the security of our elections**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODAzLjkzMzEyNTAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgwMy45MzMxMjUwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzY0Mzk4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-strengthening-security-elections/?utm_source=twitter&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=wh?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wwr) **Not in the headlines?** **[The Administration’s tough stand on Russia](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODAzLjkzMzEyNTAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgwMy45MzMxMjUwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzY0Mzk4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-protecting-elections-standing-russias-malign-activities/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wwr)**
## Photo of the Day
### Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks
**National Security Adviser John Bolton with White House Press Secretary Sarah Sanders, Director of National Intelligence Dan Coats, FBI Director Christopher Wray, Director of the National Security Agency Paul Nakasone, and Secretary of Homeland Security Kirstjen Nielsen** | August 2, 2018
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODAzLjkzMzEyNTAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgwMy45MzMxMjUwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzY0Mzk4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODAzLjkzMzEyNTAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgwMy45MzMxMjUwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzY0Mzk4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODAzLjkzMzEyNTAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgwMy45MzMxMjUwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzY0Mzk4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

This time I'm not asking for $5 - just for your signature. ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek -

The [Pledge to Reject Hate](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12ca/3e0906/6fa3461c/3e350f39/2739281694/VEsH/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/sign-the-reject-hate-pledge?source=20180803_1_PET_KCD_Pledge-3-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Pledge+to+Reject+Hate&utm_campaign=20180803_1_PET_KCD_Pledge-3-NS") is something that's bigger than just this campaign - it's about who Virginia is.

Our whole team feels strongly about taking a stand and doing something vocal around this in August - _especially Tim Kaine himself._

In fact, this pledge was his idea - and we knew we could make it a reality with supporters like you. Every month, you step up and show us the power of the many - and I know this month will be the same.

**So Derek, this time I 'm not asking for $5 - just for your signature. **

[It looks like you haven't signed yet (at least on this email address) so I'm hoping you can take a second and add your name here ->](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12ca/3e0906/6fa3461c/3e350f38/2739281694/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/sign-the-reject-hate-pledge?source=20180803_1_PET_KCD_Pledge-3-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+It+looks+like+you+havenrsquot+signed+yet&utm_campaign=20180803_1_PET_KCD_Pledge-3-NS")

Signing the pledge only takes a second, and it puts your name with what we hope will soon be thousands (_maybe hundreds of thousands_) of Virginians who believe in a safe, inclusive and big-hearted country for all.

Virginians who believe all families should stay together.

Virginians who believe your race, your ethnicity, your religion, your gender, who you love, and your economic background do not shape your right to the American dream - it's a dream for all of us.

Virginians who believe we are a safer and stronger country when we all accept and trust one another.

**Derek Willis - should your signature be next to these ideas? We think so.[Sign your name if you haven't already to be on Team Kaine's Pledge to Reject Hate.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12ca/3e0906/6fa3461c/3e350f32/2739281694/VEsO/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/sign-the-reject-hate-pledge?source=20180803_1_PET_KCD_Pledge-3-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+Sign+your+name+if+you+havenrsquot+alread&utm_campaign=20180803_1_PET_KCD_Pledge-3-NS")**

name: Shelbie Konkel, Paul Davis for Congress
subject: what we need this weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/3zsSmCz8Z5mO88u4lnJPFH06VWLRaqLnygBdq0gHIF8=/t94jtUUQzpHHvm7xqYAlk4tIm88BsVwtxJofxhvXGRM=?gpsid=13_36_2550&refcode=em18_180803_GOTVB2_fnd_gq_act__SK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180803_GOTVB2_fnd_gq_act__SK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)
Peter,

Our dedicated team of volunteers will be knocking on doors, making calls, and reminding our neighbors, friends, and family to be sure to get out and vote in the primary election on Tuesday -- but it's going to use up a lot of our resources.

We need to raise enough before midnight tonight to help them get out the vote and reach as many voters in our district as possible this weekend. **[Will you chip in $5 or more the help make it happen?](https://act.myngp.com/el/3zsSmCz8Z5mO88u4lnJPFH06VWLRaqLnygBdq0gHIF8=/t94jtUUQzpHHvm7xqYAlk4tIm88BsVwtxJofxhvXGRM=?gpsid=13_36_2550&refcode=em18_180803_GOTVB2_fnd_gq_act__SK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180803_GOTVB2_fnd_gq_act__SK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)**

We have four days left to get-out-the-vote and make sure every voter knows that Paul Davis will work with both sides of the aisle to fight for our families -- so it's urgent that we finish this leg of the campaign with force.

**[Paul will continue to fight in the general election, but we need to make sure as many people across the district cast their vote on Tuesday. Chip in $5 or more today to help us make the final push.](https://act.myngp.com/el/3zsSmCz8Z5mO88u4lnJPFH06VWLRaqLnygBdq0gHIF8=/t94jtUUQzpHHvm7xqYAlk4tIm88BsVwtxJofxhvXGRM=?gpsid=13_36_2550&refcode=em18_180803_GOTVB2_fnd_gq_act__SK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180803_GOTVB2_fnd_gq_act__SK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)**

Thank you,

Shelbie Konkel
Finance Director

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/3zsSmCz8Z5mO88u4lnJPFH06VWLRaqLnygBdq0gHIF8=/t94jtUUQzpHHvm7xqYAlk4tIm88BsVwtxJofxhvXGRM=?gpsid=13_36_2550&refcode=em18_180803_GOTVB2_fnd_gq_act__SK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180803_GOTVB2_fnd_gq_act__SK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)

Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas
---

Paul Davis for Congress
PO Box 944
Lawrence KS 66044 United States

name: Team Gillum
subject: The next 25 days
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37bb/9e00690/5839bf5b/2402e6d6/2178465400/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180803_FR_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&source=em18_180803_FR_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx")
Friends,

Since this campaign launched, there have been many who doubted the possibility of Mayor Andrew Gillum as the next Governor of Florida. They told us he didn't have the name, the ability to write himself a check, or the background.

But we're proving them wrong every single day. We have thousands of folks across the state who are joining together, turning frustration into action, and giving Mayor Gillum and this campaign their all -- because they know Mayor Gillum is the leader we need to rebuild Florida into a state that works for all of us.

Just last week, we launched our first TV ad and last night, Mayor Gillum took the debate stage in West Palm Beach and proved yet again he has the bold progressive plans and charisma to move our state forward.

We've accomplished so much together and we're so excited to see what we are able to accomplish in the next 25 days.

Bring it home,

Team Gillum

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37bb/9e00690/5839bf5b/2402e6e9/2178465400/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-august-2018?gpsid=13_55_2568&refcode=em18_180803_FR_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180803_FR_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2+-+DONATE")

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor
1550 Melvin Street,

We have thousands of folks across the state who are joining together, turning frustration into action, and giving Mayor Gillum and this campaign their all -- because they know Mayor Gillum is the leader we need to rebuild Florida into a state that works for all of us. We've accomplished so much together and we're so excited to see what we are able to accomplish in the next 25 days. Bring it home, Team Gillum "" Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor. name: The Sanders Institute
subject: Cover The Science
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE SANDERS INSTITUTE
body:
Words matter. They shape the way we think. One of the most powerful tools that we have now is the language we use. We must hold ourselves and the media accountable when talking about the climate crisi
#
Friend,
Words matter. They shape the way we think. One of the most powerful tools that we have now is the language we use. We must hold ourselves and the media accountable when talking about the climate crisis.
The planet is warming, the climate is changing and it is being caused by human activity. We are now facing a climate crisis on a global scale. We must move towards 100% renewable energy.
**[In this video, Bill McKibben describes the ways in which both individuals and the media can change the way that they talk about the climate crisis to ensure that all Americans understand what is going on, what is at stake, and what we can do to address it.](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7a9ca/bed43eb/7eea273c/75fd6823/1304969165/VEsH/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com/blog/how-we-talk-about-climate-change")**
[](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7a9ca/bed43eb/7eea273c/75fd6823/1304969165/VEsE/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com/blog/how-we-talk-about-climate-change")
The language we use has never been more important.
Thank you for staying engaged,
The Sanders Institute

name: Jason Yates
subject: SCOTUS Watch
body:
| | Critical Supreme Court Updates from a Faith Perspective
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Fscotuswatch%2Fsecond-edition%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180803com01&n=1)
| We are closely following the events of Judge Kavanaugh’s confirmation to the Supreme Court. **Three important updates:**
1. Earlier this week the first Democratic Senator, Joe Manchin, met with Judge Kavanaugh. Senator Manchin is facing a difficult re-election campaign in the red-state of West Virginia; a state Trump won in 2016. Manchin remains one of the potential swing votes that may cross party lines to vote in support of Kavanaugh.
2. Republican Senator Rand Paul also announced this week he would support Kavanaugh’s nomination after initially expressing concerns over Kavanaugh’s position on the Fourth Amendment.
3. Kavanaugh is certainly facing one of the toughest Supreme Court confirmations in history. Senators have begun reading through over 1 million pages of legal opinions and emails from Judge Kavanaugh. The volume of records being reviewed dwarfs those reviewed in the confirmation processes for both Supreme Court Justice Neil Gorsuch (182,000 pages) and Justice Elena Kagan (170,000 pages).

**As our Senators in Washington D.C. continue to learn more about Judge Kavanaugh’s record, we want to highlight for you two important cases that lead many to believe Judge Kavanaugh will protect the critical right of religious liberty.** Because of legal battles threatening freedom of religion in the public square, it’s now more important today than ever before that the next Supreme Court Justice uphold religious liberty, one of the most essential American ideals outlined in the First Amendment of the Constitution.
* In the case Newdow v. Roberts, Judge Kavanaugh upheld the opening prayer and invocation of God at government ceremonies. He wrote, “stripping government ceremonies of any references to God or religious expression . . . would, in effect, ‘establish’ atheism.”
* Recently, at oral argument in the case Archdiocese of Washington v. WMATA, Judge Kavanaugh called D.C. Metro’s ban on religious advertising, including Christmas ads, “pure discrimination” and “odious” to the First Amendment.

The Center for Inquiry, a secularist advocacy group, argues that his joining the Supreme Court would mean more decisions such as the [Hobby Lobby ruling](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.dailysignal.com%2F2014%2F07%2F05%2Fseparation-church-state-won-hobby-lobby%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180803com01&n=2). In that decision, the justices upheld the religious freedom of some employers not to be bound by Obamacare requirements that employee health insurance plans cover contraception, sterilization, and abortion-inducing drugs. In addition, during an interlude in private practice, he headed the Federalist Society’s Religious Liberties Practice Group and wrote two pro bono Supreme Court amicus briefs in support of the cause of religious liberty. We will continue to keep you up to date on any developments to Kavanaugh’s nomination process. Senate Judiciary Committee Chair, Chuck Grassley, said Kavanaugh’s hearings are anticipated to begin in September and a confirmation vote in October at the latest. **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180803com01&n=3)
* * *
[Support My Faith Votes with your tax deductible donation.](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Fdonate&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180803com01&n=4) _My Faith Votes is a non-partisan movement focused on motivating Christians in America to participate in local and national elections and be active members of society. By partnering with local churches, pastors, and national faith leaders, My Faith Votes mobilizes and equips Christians to lead the conversation on the place of faith in culture and politics._
---
* * *
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180803com01&n=5).
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fmyfaithvotes&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180803com01&n=6) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.twitter.com%2Fmyfaithvotes&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180803com01&n=7) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2Fmyfaithvotes&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180803com01&n=8)

Don't miss this opportunity to hit the streets to help win races up and down the ballot this November. [**Wherever you are, you can make a difference to help turn Maryland blue -- sign up now to join the fun and canvass in your county!**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a93d/7ab0e2c4/7fcf8803/349b395b/1050109636/VEsE/ "https://secure.ngpvan.com/dAEdxbI5W0Gwgm9R3SBZdw2") The Maryland Democratic Coordinated Campaign will be running canvassing shifts from [10:00 a.m. to 4:00 p.m. across the state tomorrow](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a93d/7ab0e2c4/7fcf8803/349b395b/1050109636/VEsF/ "https://secure.ngpvan.com/dAEdxbI5W0Gwgm9R3SBZdw2"), and we know that winning will come down to turning out voters like our friends and neighbors. While Larry Hogan and his wealthy allies are already spending millions to attack Ben, Democrats are running a people-powered campaign to bring bold, new leadership to Maryland and ensure we fully fund our schools, fix our broken healthcare system, and build an economy that works for all of us. [**Last year, Democrats in Maryland knocked on 100,000 doors -- let's beat that this year. Sign up now to join the Maryland Democratic Coordinated Campaign and canvass your neighborhood tomorrow!**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a93d/7ab0e2c4/7fcf8803/349b395b/1050109636/VEsC/ "https://secure.ngpvan.com/dAEdxbI5W0Gwgm9R3SBZdw2") Thanks, Travis Travis Tazelaar

name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: [Deadline] 2,534 donations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
We're relying 100% on the people.
#

Peter -
We're six days away from our next official fundraising deadline, and how we do here is going to set the tone for the last few weeks before Election Day.
The media and our opponents are going to look at the numbers we report as an indication of our campaign's strength. Not just how much we raise, but more importantly -- how many people are powering this campaign.
Let's show our opponents and the media what a real grassroots campaign looks like. In the next six days, we want to generate as many individual donations as all of our opponents reported collectively at the last deadline: 2,534.
**[Can you make a $3 donation right now to help us get there? The political and financial establishment is likely to spend unlimited sums of money to stop us, but together we can beat them.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e89/6e822e2f/1a50363b/41724c0e/1355175130/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA4MDMtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-august-deadline?refcode=em180803-full")**
Our opponents are all relying on big donors and corporate money to buy this election for them. But you cannot be independent when you are beholden to special interests. That's why I have rejected all corporate money. We're relying 100% on the people.
Let me be clear: Everything we have accomplished so far is thanks to you. But that means we cannot let up now. We have to press even harder.
Thank you in advance for chipping in. With your support, we're going to win.
Best,
Zephyr
**[DONATE](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e89/6e822e2f/1a50363b/41724c0e/1355175130/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA4MDMtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-august-deadline?refcode=em180803-full")**

* * *
Paid for by Zephyr for NY

1789 Madison Ave, New York, NY 10035

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. subject: Not kidding -- we just got another amazing poll
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

This is some serious momentum. In the last 72 hours, THREE polls have
dropped showing Beto within single digits of Senator Ted Cruz. Today’s
poll comes from Public Policy Polling and shows Beto just down by four.
But what’s even more exciting is how much ground our grassroots campaign
has made up to cut Ted Cruz’s lead. Take a look:

PPP Poll (Jan. 18)
Difference: Cruz by 8

--------------------------------------------

PPP Poll (Jun. 8)
Difference: Cruz by 6

--------------------------------------------

PPP Poll (Aug. 3)
Difference: Cruz by 4

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/1830?refcode=em20180803&t=1019&akid=2409%2E444211%2ETL2Wc8 ]We've cut Cruz’s lead by half and can’t stop now if we want to win
this November. Can you give a
donation of
$3
to Beto’s campaign to take on Ted Cruz right now? We rely on grassroots
donations from people like you to power our movement -- and we’ll need
everyone doing their part to keep the momentum going.

We mean it when we say it: our campaign couldn’t be possible without you

name: Team Leah
subject: Nicholson’s fake news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
There's a lot of fake news out there about Leah right now and we know exactly where it's coming from. Kevin Nicholson. Though Kevin claimed he......

Friend, there's a lot of fake news out there about Leah right now and we know exactly where it's coming from.

Kevin Nicholson.

Though Kevin claimed he would be focusing his attention on beating Tammy Baldwin, he and his campaign have released a misleading ad that accuses Leah of not being "sufficiently" pro-Trump. Of all things!

We hope you’ll read this from [Right Wisconsin](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=fe4d6d4137ed456aad5448b48b82800d&_e=40d_lnIp2nYw_xW98zt4ZlPNh45PtQ0-RVwOVrNQjWTh9fTMOljcQYScMTsRE9ErJbMgBPkwTu4QiYrH0mHa8-ka6jAQRnZvrdCXCqBO92GGi10EnX1Gq_ultYN9yeMtCxjtpOLNOa9nPjC-O-39xmRRlqARFqbkJzpBDrKw2-WE9iBIUJDEBHNt9FGDuoKEUvumCwvtEfq00YQEaHREfE0cBwC6AcIBuatLN2uyAAys_rkEmNtldd0T8yf1qQDG46EDFY_cuWyMHl88hRU1yVQ_td4E69AQ4InNr3uXSJri6-tmnz5Dk4cj5USlIP3r) yesterday:

_“Last night I received a press release from the Nicholson campaign along with their new ad attacking his Republican primary opponent, state Sen. Leah Vukmir (R-Brookfield). The ad follows just days after the Breitbart News hit piece on Vukmir accusing her of not being sufficiently pro-Trump....

“The video clip was from before the Wisconsin presidential primary, and Vukmir was clearly talking about not endorsing him in the primary.... Vukmir opposed Trump in the primary, just like Kevin Nicholson who donated to Sen. Marco Rubio (R-FL). If Vukmir is to be held accountable for her sentiments in March before the primary, so should Nicholson.

“In fact, let’s point out that Richard Uihlein, Nicholson’s major financial backer in his U.S. Senate campaign, actually donated $2 million to Our Principles Super-PAC whose sole purpose was to stop Trump from getting the nomination. Remember the Real Donald Trump Quotes About Women ad? That was funded by the same person backing Nicholson. Perhaps Nicholson wants to give Uihlein all of his money back and turn down all of those Uihlein-engineered endorsements.

“Nicholson is also supported by Club for Growth, which opposed Trump’s nomination. And, of course, Nicholson has said that he wants to emulate Cruz if he is elected a senator. Does that include Cruz’s “vote your conscience speech” when he refused to endorse Trump at the Republican National Convention?

“But, of course, while Nicholson’s friends were making life difficult for Trump,_**_Vukmir actually campaigned for the future president._**

**_“Vukmir was part of a Republican Women for Trump group_** _and appeared in an ad endorsing Trump in the closing days of the 2016 campaign..._**_when it was a substantial risk to Vukmir’s political career._**

_“_** _Since then Vukmir has been a Trump loyalist on just about every issue...._**_Vukmir was even faster than Nicholson to condemn Steve Bannon after he criticized the Trump family....

“Nicholson running an ad trying to show that Vukmir is insufficiently pro-Trump is just dishonest and insulting to Republican voters’ intelligence. Maybe Nicholson is right with this gamble. Maybe he can get away with lying about Vukmir’s record. And since his campaign is staffed by ‘outsiders,’ none of them will pay a price for their dishonesty, including those that have also criticized Trump in 2016 like consultant Jeff Roe. He predicted the Republican Party would have to change its name if Trump was nominated.

“This level of dishonesty by Nicholson calls into question his honesty about everything else he has said in the campaign. When ambition means more to a former U.S. Marine than honor, when truth is just an inconvenience, then Nicholson is not fighting ‘the swamp.’ He’s bringing ‘the swamp’ to Wisconsin politics, and he is a creature of the swamp’s making.”_

Friend, it's never been more obvious: Leah is the only candidate who we know will help President Trump drain the swamp and put America First.

Please, join us today to support Leah Vukmir for Senate: **[https://secure.anedot.com/leah/donate/](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=fe4d6d4137ed456aad5448b48b82800d&_e=40d_lnIp2nYw_xW98zt4Zr_1FentAuIFUz58qpucMZfPgeY74uk6jfEEkeyGdKd9Du8bNB9Pv1lG3J8QM8vxt7QYrWTTmITqZUdtB0P-lLFV3jsdYWlYUi2ZMNOaqwTd5Ksed7sQETPbmZ3jPdBh8rm0ruk4jjcjpNv1q95WuQ0jBqoN0QB-kIfzTIjrpehQT9WjJDfR5dubkd6QZsFh5bPf11doywdtSOd-c6HPSE0TEq37CmZ7UXDqvIjEqf-vRWwjEz_xbkYVj48VTG7zwwqrV4098ygUZCH7inVJ5sYhm5y-GXfrOImyFKS45s_fprdN1w5fnpQimpllvrVwLIoAJ4kb4dwHxGTwSah0Gre22NVVRzMVvd_pLdMN8qkPFCMfs6bG90armjtrXFiDU0ghh9ejYKFnQIvZwWvuLq4%3D)**

Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=fe4d6d4137ed456aad5448b48b82800d&_e=40d_lnIp2nYw_xW98zt4ZmqUNxCQRbxScC8Q9S6-qi1xGZsJ1Gfm_yzBEvWWI2BZWCtyi8tDvO6zlBrrBn3-cyvN33ovekTTEKgqKVqjcIgu_rGgsk4pUTWwKhowMKMbkYT_nru-TvxbFdLmZjdFc6sNSZhF44ZPcSAh2VswRHAeoDxLSBlcYr2DbqLbjGjYEnI6WjiImJu_OMQgtFGnse8yKJfNVFvf8LMpEGbY1zggMVbAjEACqx8gxAIjZ0kphn7J57Vq7BObCtL5QSgML8cc3jtrk7e-Ym6uk284ffp0CTT9Uk8loPeel5plMGOG6GyGn5g8T22rGbE095Vyyk-38JxCmNmWEsmFG_Bg2PKZton-jf5zWFxHqshl2b78) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=fe4d6d4137ed456aad5448b48b82800d&_e=40d_lnIp2nYw_xW98zt4ZmqUNxCQRbxScC8Q9S6-qi3p5lQWxXLVyEPacVkY83PEnrFolkdohTu6fwWLTNifnST1T4hX5RH1kxUQpwohETtkPH1fqHjZE8vZc5U3RXEiUUe-yB9gyENeR4kD0mr-b0FrlM3rYGaKpOsIodjG8a5BUihzY69XunTE6QpE5dEhZFN4dbdfcxoBkpZjhcyN3XPAgA5ivvrzKCVaA6bQfZa9E6l5rVpNPYsUs7YDYk9tJz7mXQjjmVkLteO8evfw5ns_X828T5ix0NP1Xt6boY52bwE1jLPL6JqXHcay714qBzRgOAuX30UWKtA0RZ2mt0B0WYrHsDmtCOJmnAADy71tvr-HsRWeOar_NBGAI78V) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=fe4d6d4137ed456aad5448b48b82800d&_e=40d_lnIp2nYw_xW98zt4ZkMUhpdmssiFvHM38sqz1evCxPUIjm6cUmptsc3EU5IMJxdAYchcfz72aGxOdj8E_PtgWY5j4Pa_qYQTbXO0sBhgQjEBJapcYP6EiYsFM3Y0aWWRhGCJE3Av_MR-6yVjnraQFB3H2HTeFQWsWrTjdsr_4TXB5HsWmqhExbG1CL7pTBeT6d2bU09dlDkZAmr2grzGMxFWVWGLKzITi9zLg-V2-f8hV37v05BsqqogFOyAJHTu8Ez8DStcoAJljl4Auw%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=fe4d6d4137ed456aad5448b48b82800d&_e=40d_lnIp2nYw_xW98zt4ZuEcGFn8HAuPyUjebqFSTqX5fJ7MTaF3QTxRvq7Mg0zDeu-GPovriVr2LSpMnVJm4FRaNZ0_kjJvTlv1X1Ze03TuRefh2b1AaqE2C8dDNpgN7RgkavPh6ts832ab1qXBdK4UWCfS0lM2EdsySbsychdDrPISaDG6I4ArFbbvP0tnHZ5u9xKx5cHs0kXSW5u-SwECD34EU9nTpzzLG50CONoE68Nclvfp10M8duVNwGuAzkPP6MUs-_46cR4IpH9c-A%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=fe4d6d4137ed456aad5448b48b82800d&_e=40d_lnIp2nYw_xW98zt4ZviA-atTIfMUHo-Un3KfS3Njn71tLHJW7w_LK8MGkQizt6mupuujEM988b0jlggMbL_KwnZkahVFg_p6bERICDnfLlohzUUJqB3QpJz-0l0SxcCmBVkTf5ZZs12EDjtZnsaTcsjXfDd8KhXaO9LzUp-oMxrGO5PDwosSqmixOx9AfrJMg3FfiLQ3st9caBtuwuEKE7WEK6nWHKd4ZzTdoMDZJl3oCjXndswcp5s6oU0eSW1183jSk-V_gekAXs8TMw%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=fe4d6d4137ed456aad5448b48b82800d&_e=40d_lnIp2nYw_xW98zt4ZmqUNxCQRbxScC8Q9S6-qi2KMBEb4Lq17wrF9KOYrduKsvY03t3FnTC_9baHSl3pu_nc8-Gadl44p6FLfU6oJqPmAU_p3L_tNq2t5_2sWMDMYJ_Nd-8eUO7bs7ciuVzQfu0AFf0NEW1Z_rgMAJif7wh9QTgt2hR-eWaGrhw8XRjWoES4heFkpYlGmXWARS1jZbAOX5nbKvTvTUJai8yHdepsMWukHSyyCm5b7IozvXYPjPH1lL7Wtz8pNBDv1w5egscyt44oWnpivbaduNoB7b_m8ys0Enyi5Pg6Tim8cbbaEfqJVvKTBSOQnI7HPbfsQtIulDXeNIMVGj757I6-YMPGumWURDzzZ8qgzKRHXtBx0WfW9OhXySuwGByaEJdo7A%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. I'm no ally of this administration. I fight back time and time again as Trump and Pence attempt to destroy Americans' access to affordable healthcare. I'm constantly pushing against their attempts to roll back women's rights. I'm a thorn in their side most of the time, and they know it.
Pence and Trump think they can barnstorm Ohio, drape their arms around my opponent, and kick me out of the Senate. But they've forgotten one thing: **Ohio isn't a "Trump state" or a "red state." It's a state of hardworking men and women who want a Senator who fights for them.**
The people of Ohio are my _number one_ priority. That's the real reason Trump and Pence and all the special interests don't like me very much. And that's okay by me.
[**Because I have you fighting beside me, we will overcome all their lies and smears. Be sure to rush in your contribution before the match runs out to have double the impact.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff86d/4462dc26/6fcae787/20076e9e/2154528137/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180803?refcode=sbe180803_m")

---
With gratitude,
Sherrod

name: Mara Boggs
subject: Less than 100 Days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Manchin for West Virginia
body:
Can you believe we are less than 100 days away from re-electing Joe this November?

Time flies! Last week, we were proud to launch Business Leaders for Joe, a group that has quickly grown to over 100 businesses from across the state who are proud to stand alongside Joe. Business leaders can continue to sign up at this link. [JoeManchinWV.com/BusinessLeaders](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UBSinc%2fCPYaKe6UoarcXKZDqPS%2f%2frJ8NOCUBwmPsGS9Mu32kS7BygyDVO7DBUTJMeT%2fS5mdSOpwl3GS%2bQsRL0G%2fA3GFFN%2b2mp847PeKTQCTki1V5VHb1f8Q)
I'll make this quick. West Virginians are stepping up to help out our campaign. Last weekend, we were excited to be a part of the WV Women's Summit and the Monongalia and Wirt County Fairs and other events across the state.

This week, Team Manchin will be heading all around the state, stopping by the Saint Albans Riverfest, the Ohio River Festival, the Mercer County Fair, the WV Water Festival, and the Peach Festival to name a few.

Business Leaders for Joe

A large group of business leaders from across West Virginia, representing a wide array of industries, announced the the launch of "Business Leaders for Manchin." The founding members of the group represent all of West Virginia - Republicans, Democrats, and Independents. The job creators who have built companies in West Virginia are supporting Manchin because of his record and commitment to helping both workers and businesses thrive. More info here.

If you are a West Virginia business leaders, and want to join the group, you can add your name HERE: [JoeManchinWV.com/BusinessLeaders](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UBSinc%2fCPYaKe6UoarcXKZDqPS%2f%2frJ8NOCUBwmPsGS9Mu32kS7BygyDVO7DBUTJMeT%2fS5mdSOpwl3GS%2bQsRL0G%2fA3GFFN%2b2mp847PeKTQCTki1V5VHb1f8Q)

[WATCH NOW: The latest #IKnowJoe video featuring business leaders across West Virginia.](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC4w3nz3AbA71RcXJPuLNXO3Zp%2bFP6%2by8yB2kJfoZehw8pbuiYJKsAfLo10B4P0ZVuAHFUSlgaNXNooTAhLKM2QC6nWUC9VbD0xqxv6sN4kWTxbZ%2btFuAA0HK1Oxgs49hCexfJbaLPlmBn)

Joe in the News

Washington Times:[Manchin to meet with Supreme Court nominee Brett Kavanaugh](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC42K2HtSUxON1lcecMICN5lXH8f4Hu7FGpvrhqFrBKXxQn%2ful29F5jPWQhf%2bLGfTbk4cEneAgQkC2RkAIsodPN7bWv0t9i7DVz6bSHoEPVaNOKcC3T8HU35od2ArH2HKqkeTAco4JBYcARk63vElkR6XT3kj2hcqpjAlN2mYYbtuOYCm9LDfanzVW%2bCfk0rR1ZqPcNSIRJdie)
WVMetroNews: [Manchin leads Democrats on resolution protecting pre-existing conditions coverage](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UBSinc%2fCPYaKUndq20wdI18Y2TYgJqBgagCLbY4ypF4cQKYElipDeREpX7XN9juYoRg2lOpZUFyNsN7%2bMEUU6dAc8jPxOrCo%2fMfYUYjyeVqUc5d1HGKGzGeLtRtbUXxtgsopvdHx8ak3NLkmVHpRb6UjFgLFcM5kDkNVmkyFT0u3R%2blAz8913ZfuUr59OZo0rTSCuWykdBgFgQ4YsgxKLsRsjjKjrUEtMlKrMVQjeKqtg%3d%3d)

Best,

Mara Boggs
Campaign Manager
Manchin for West Virginia

P.S. [Check out this editorial from the Gazette-Mail about Morrisey's lawsuit to take away protections for people with pre-existing conditions.](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC42K2HtSUxON1nrE8P441a634V1QhzY1y7PrWfnXSL1DKUGrGaV6Vm2DSvb8YkSg6QwId5gh2FTkVR29jKKL0LeooTNSMDdiWk1lfZNhKcj6yVo6nqzKtLLHSrkUPAcicpY79x0j7nTpF%2bl86fwPL%2b49C4c9HDHvCYSSHiyrX8%2fXwKTfNmS831Bz0Bfds1zKgyzAJhbK%2fpRSqweiVofhfd53cmjKTRrJ73iVCHN2tjI0GLuDoDrI%2f0ZSWyD%2fzW7rO%2f3yPEVrBKRB4aJHqLA5CveBdElCGI2mLRdRZitY7Ec08)

Paid for by Manchin for West Virginia

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Why President Obama is on #TeamAbrams:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa96e/34a064cc/a72ed61/70e9d9b/3244500741/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friends - President Barack Obama endorsed our campaign for progress! Here's what President Obama had to say: _"I am so excited to endorse Stacey Abrams for Governor of Georgia. She 's not running a campaign built on division or distraction; she's running to lead one Georgia where everybody has opportunity, and everybody's voice is heard. And she's got the record of building consensus that shows she can deliver - with good jobs, great public education, expanded Medicaid, and secure, affordable health insurance for everyone. In a time when too many folks are focused simply on how to win an election, Stacey's somebody who cares about something more important: why we should. That's the kind of politics we should practice. That's why I'm proud to give Stacey Abrams my support."_ **[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa96e/34a064cc/a72ed61/70e9d98/3244500741/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODAzMTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/obama-abrams?refcode=IE080318-full")** I am so humbled to have President Obama's endorsement in our critical race. He knows that with only three months until Election Day, we all need to stand united for progress - starting right here in Georgia. **[Will you join President Barack Obama and contribute $5 to our people-powered campaign?](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa96e/34a064cc/a72ed61/70e9d98/3244500741/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODAzMTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/obama-abrams?refcode=IE080318-full")** President Obama doesn't publicly endorse every Democrat who runs for office, especially not this early. But he understands that our campaign will affect Georgia families in every way, from Medicaid expansion to excellent public schools, criminal justice reform to good jobs. **We still have a lot of work to do between now and November, but we know how we'll win:** Team Abrams, with your help, is going to spend smarter, work harder, and win this election by turning out the voters we need to close the gap and take our state forward. That's how we won our primary by more than 50 points. Imagine what we can accomplish in November if we all step up right now. **If you stand with me and President Obama - and you are committed to the fight for progress, equality, and opportunity - please chip in to support our historic voter outreach effort:** **[http://secure.staceyabrams.com/JoinObama](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa96e/34a064cc/a72ed61/70e9d98/3244500741/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODAzMTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/obama-abrams?refcode=IE080318-full")** President Obama is with us. He knows first-hand that progress isn't always easy - but it is always worth fighting for. Thank you for fighting with us. Now, let's get to work. Stacey Abrams
---
**[DONATE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa96e/34a064cc/a72ed61/70e9d98/3244500741/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODAzMTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/obama-abrams?refcode=IE080318-full")**

subject: Obama

body:
_Please see a special message from our sponsor._ Fellow Conservative, President Obama has thrown down the gauntlet. He just endorsed 22 Liberal Congressional candidates... many of whom are in the most competitive battles in the country and are determined to take down our Conservative Majority. Obama's UNPRECEDENTED intervention threatens to tip the scales towards his rubber-stamped Liberals -- and against Conservatives like us. I won't stand for it. name: Jessica Morse
subject: our district is burning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/PvyGjx4d9B5z5yVBJBiki1xfE2NkQAJteXHBocOvxEQ=/156wdSWNaI109CwYDaO0FWjE0CB4D1YBVZ-naO2kH1w=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180803_JM_firestmnt_all_logo)
Peter,
Our district is burning. The Ferguson Fire has claimed two lives--Brian Hughes of Squaw Valley and Braden Varney of Mariposa--and has shut down Yosemite for more than a week now.
Three new fires have prompted evacuations in El Dorado County and burned 700 acres in Placer County. A new fire in Alpine County forced the Hun A Leli Ti people of the Washoe Tribe to evacuate their reservation at one in the morning. The Carr fire, one of the most devastating fire disasters in our state's history, is a fire so hot it created a fire tornado--which claimed the lives of six people, including two children and one of my neighbors in Pollock Pines who was working to defend our communities against the fire.
**My heart is broken for those who 've lost their homes, seen their communities ravaged, even made the ultimate sacrifice to protect their neighbors. **
These fires are preventable. We know why they rage: a century of bad fire suppression policy has led to overly dense forests. If policymakers had been investing in fire prevention instead, we could have prevented the levels of devastation we are experiencing this week.
We could have been thinning our forests, finding uses for skinny trees and forest waste, and issuing thoughtful permits for grazing and selective logging.
**There are solutions. But until we have new leadership, they will not come to pass.**
Up in Tahoe, the mountains are barely visible above the layers of smoke. Even those not directly in the fires' paths have to keep their children inside, and many of our neighbors are still evacuated and are unsure if they will even have homes to return to.
Protecting ourselves from future disasters starts with changing our leadership. Our neighbors deserve nothing less. [_**Help spread the word --share our Facebook statement on these disasters now.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/PvyGjx4d9B5z5yVBJBiki1xfE2NkQAJteXHBocOvxEQ=/FFqz8UFqIL6jra-AL2HukxFs18cOib6RkDLKT1Jk4TA=?type=3&theater)
Thank you,
Jessica
[CONTRIBUTE >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/PvyGjx4d9B5z5yVBJBiki1xfE2NkQAJteXHBocOvxEQ=/156wdSWNaI109CwYDaO0FWjE0CB4D1YBVZ-naO2kH1w=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180803_JM_firestmnt_all_contribbutton)
---

Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign.

Roseville CA 95611 United States

name: Team Scholten
subject: Inspiring Words From a Pulitzer Prize Winner!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
In today's Storm Lake Times, Pulitzer Prize winning journalist Art Cullen takes a look at the race between J.D. Scholten and Steve King. A few of the highlights:
_"The DC Democrats think nobody can beat King and they write us off in a self-fulfilling prophecy. This time they should pay attention.**Something is happening...**_
_... he packed a crowd into Plaza Mexico on Tuesday the likes of which we have not seen in the past two decades for a Democratic congressional candidate. Several were independents we never have seen at a political event before..._
_...Scholten had a sharp, friendly bilingual aide making certain that every person had signed up, finding chairs, making sure trains ran on-time, and securing volunteers for the campaign. Nobody got away from her.**This has not happened before**..._
_..there is energy on the ground in Iowa. They can feel it..._
_...That’s what feels different today: an electorate fed up with the corruption and cynicism of Washington, but now an alternative in J.D. Scholten has cropped up with a little money in his wallet and a message of unity against the madness, with a sense of humor. Oh, for that relief we pray. Vote for JD Scholten. Make it different this time.**Enough is enough**."_
_~_ Art Cullen

Box 3531 Sioux City, IA 51102 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: betofortexas.com
subject: Ted Cruz is attacking us on TV
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

This is a critical moment for our campaign. How we respond could shape the
race for these final months to come. Ted Cruz just launched the first
negative attack ad on Beto -- and it is as misleading and dirty as these
ads come.

Here’s how we fight back: Every time Ted Cruz and the super PACs behind
him launch negative attacks on Beto, we will make them pay by raising more
money online and signing up more volunteers than ever before. We’re going
to keep this campaign positive, and in doing so we’ll send an unmistakable
message about the way campaigns
should be run.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/2330?refcode=em20180803&t=1019&akid=2441%2E444211%2EB55EmU ]Stand up to Ted Cruz’s negative attacks on Beto by making
a
$3
contribution to our campaign right now. Each contribution sends a powerful
message that we’re sick and tired of negative and misleading political
ads.

Let’s really stretch our goal here so we can send a message -- let’s see
if we can raise $1 million online over the weekend to respond to this
attack. If you haven’t contributed yet, this is a good
time to make your first contribution. We need to be able
to show that every time Ted Cruz attacks our campaign or Beto, we will
ONLY grow stronger.

It’s clear they’re running scared: these ads dropped just hours after
brand-new polls show Beto within single digits of Cruz. We can make up
that ground, but we need to respond quickly to these attacks from the Cruz
campaign.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/2330?refcode=em20180803&t=1020&akid=2441%2E444211%2EB55EmU ]Make a
contribution of
$3
now, and then forward this email to your friends and family. Ask them to
join our campaign and give what they can.

We have a huge opportunity today to prove that Ted Cruz’s attacks will
only strengthen our campaign. Let’s make sure we seize it.

Team Beto

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/2330?refcode=em20180803&t=1021&akid=2441%2E444211%2EB55EmU ]Contribute
$3

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-email?refcode=em20180803footer&t=1022&akid=2441%2E444211%2EB55EmU

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=2441%2E444211%2EB55EmU

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

| **Campaign Update** The campaign is in full swing as we head into the final days before the Primary Election and we thought we'd share a brief campaign update. The Governor is humbled by your support and encouragement, and he will continue his fight to make Vermont more affordable.
* * *
**Primary Debate Coverage**
Over the last two weeks Governor Scott and his opponent have participated in three debates -- and if you missed them -- we’d encourage you to watch! **There is a clear choice in the August 14th Primary Election! ** **[WCAX Primary Debate](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=6186ee7efc&e=19cebfe173)** **[VPR Primary Debate](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=2f1ef3fd00&e=19cebfe173)** **[Channel 17/ VT Digger Debate](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=e7e7f8ef06&e=19cebfe173)**
* * *
**Governor Scott needs your support. Here's how you can help:**
1. **Please vote!** You can vote early by visiting your Town Clerk’s Office, or you can vote at the polls on **August 14th.**
2. **Encourage 5 other people to vote!**
3. **Display a lawn sign!** If you need one, please click [here](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=479f28d3ff&e=19cebfe173) and submit your request.
4. **Make a $25 dollar[contribution](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=82c4d77a5f&e=19cebfe173) today!**

* * *
**In case you missed it!** **[Governor Jim Douglas and Lt. Governor Brian Dubie endorse Governor Phil Scott for reelection and encourage you to get out and vote on August 14th!](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=17cd8a3956&e=19cebfe173)**
* * *
**In the news:** **Governor Scott fought to eliminate the tax on social security: VTDigger,[“Social Security Exemptions are now in place”](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=2e3590a31a&e=19cebfe173)**

**Governor Scott’s proposal cuts income tax rates, saves $30 million: My Champlain Valley,[“Vermonters saving $30 Million because of income tax reform”](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=6fc1013157&e=19cebfe173) **

**Governor Scott’s economic investments are paying off; 4,500 more in our labor force: WCAX,[“Scott says Vermont’s workforce is growing”](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=f3df5e1de0&e=19cebfe173)**
* * *

body:
\----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | _**[Donald Trump just ENDORSED our GOP opponent, Scott Wagner:](https://secure.wolfforpa. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wolf-trump-endorsed?utm_campaign=em18_180803_trumpendors_fnd_clq_act__em2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180803_trumpendors_fnd_clq_act__em2&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_content=1+-+Donald+Trump+just+ENDORSED+our+GOP+oppon")**_ | [](https://secure.wolfforpa. ---
When Donald Trump says Scott Wagner will be "one hell of a governor" we know what that means.

Wagner will slash funding for education, gut health care protections, and roll back a woman's right to choose.

With members of the Trump administration attacking women's rights every chance they get, we need voices at the state level to fight back. Voices that will stand up for our right to choose, for our access to reproductive health care and for equal pay.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Half a Million
body:
When it comes to winning an election, it's all about talking to voters. Talking to voters can happen almost anywhere...including at their doors... |
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| **_Half a Million_** When it comes to winning an election, it's all about talking with voters. Talking with voters can happen almost anywhere...including at their doors and at community events.

Here in Indiana, you might already be seeing the evidence of a ground game that is unprecedented in its scope and its coordination. To secure victory for our statewide and local Republican candidates in November, we have field staff and volunteers (like all of you!) out talking with voters using better technology, increased resources, and more seamless coordination between our candidates, your state party, and our partners at the Republican National Committee than ever before. And I'm excited to report that together, we have already surpassed more than _**half a million voter contacts**_** ** so far this year (and yes, that is far outpacing the level of voter contact we're seeing from Democrats)!

One way we're reaching these historic numbers is through our National Weeks of Action, like we had last weekend when more than 100 Hoosiers were out pounding the pavement -- knocking on doors and making phone calls. Keep an eye on this newsletter for news of the next National Week of Action...or [sign up here now](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ac621df98d&e=1acd9bb3d6) to volunteer and get involved.

And another way we're talking with voters is at events like the Indiana State Fair, which opened today for its 17-day run. We again have a booth at the fair, and I encourage you to stop by (we're on the north side of the fair near the Free Stage just north of the covered bridge). When you stop in, you can sign a **Mike Braun** for U.S. Senate sign (the county with the most signatures wins!), fill out a voter opinion survey, and grab some of your own Republican swag!

Elections are won in Indiana by talking to Hoosiers. I'd [encourage you to join in](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=91146ce72e&e=1acd9bb3d6)...and help us secure victory for**Mike Braun, Connie Lawson, Kelly Mitchell, Tera Klutz** and our**local Republican candidates** throughout Indiana.

-Kyle

_**Photo:** Last weekend, Hoosiers were busy knocking on doors and talking to Hoosiers as part of our latest National Week of Action..and they're setting new records. _
---
| |
---
| | **_Governor Holcomb's Week That Was_**
---
|
---
| **_Step Right Up!_**
Today, **Governor Eric Holcomb** was on hand to officially open the 2018 Indiana State Fair! His day started with the the annual Indiana Pork Ham Breakfast, which is organized by Indiana's pork producers (and featured some great jokes from our governor). **Governor Holcomb** then made stops across the fair, meeting with the Hoosiers who make the fair possible and highlighting our state's rich agricultural heritage.

For 17 days, the Indiana State Fair will celebrate Indiana agriculture, all that it means for Indiana, and all that Indiana agriculture means for the world. And if you stop in, you might just see**Governor Holcomb**...and, of course, get a chance to sample some of Indiana's true State Fair delicacies.

And to get you in the Indiana State Fair spirit, you'll [definitely want to watch this video](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=68186c2884&e=1acd9bb3d6), featuring**Governor Holcomb** and several familiar Hoosier faces!
---
|
---
| | **_The Mike Braun Corner_**
---
|
---
---
| **_Braun Stops by County Fairs_**
Summer means fair season in Indiana...and it’s not just the Indiana State Fair. Leading up to the state fair, counties throughout the state held their own fairs to celebrate agriculture and another year of 4-H success.

This week, **Mike Braun** joined in on the fun, meeting with Hoosiers at the Vanderburgh and Morgan county fairs. Of course, while **Mike Braun** is spending time meeting with Hoosiers, Democrat Joe Donnelly continues to [follow his Democrat boss Chuck Schumer’s orders](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5ceb783dbd&e=1acd9bb3d6) to delay taking a position on confirming Judge Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court.

We know that **Mike Braun** is our voice...and we can’t wait to see him be elected as our next U.S. Senator this November!
---
|
---
| | **_Indiana State Fair Booth_**
---
|
---
---
| _**Join Us at the Indiana State Fair! **_
Your Indiana Republican Party will once again have a booth at this year's Indiana State Fair! The booth, which is located near the Free Stage just north of the Covered Bridge, is open from 10 a.m. to 10 p.m. and will run the full 17 days of the fair.

Stop by and sign our **Mike Braun** banner with your county (just like Auditor Tera Klutz did today!), and as part of a county-versus-county competition, the county with the most signatures will win!

Or if you’re interested in being the face of our party at the fair, there are still opportunities to volunteer at the booth with a three-hour shift (you'll get a free ticket into the fair). Sign up [**here**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=df51fa4819&e=1acd9bb3d6), and we’ll be in touch!
---
|
---
| _**Upcoming Republican Events**_
[August 6](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5ea61bbadd&e=1acd9bb3d6): St. Joseph County Victory Party
[August 7](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=98a277c268&e=1acd9bb3d6): Hamilton County Meet & Greet With U.S. Senate Candidate Mike Braun
[August 7](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b2e4483999&e=1acd9bb3d6): St. Joseph County Meet & Greet With U.S. Senate Candidate Mike Braun
[August 9](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bedaebc721&e=1acd9bb3d6): Boone County GOP Annual Golf Scramble
[August 10](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=39cb81be16&e=1acd9bb3d6): Vanderburgh County Reagan Day Dinner
[August 11](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=186a090075&e=1acd9bb3d6): Harrison County Monthly Party Meeting
[August 11](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f9a9b50b14&e=1acd9bb3d6): Ice Cream Social with Greg Pence
[August 17](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=44b8339af5&e=1acd9bb3d6): 27th Annual Newton County GOP Golf Outing
[August 18](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=65d47978b7&e=1acd9bb3d6): Kosciusko County Republican Women’s Meeting
[August 22](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=65837fab5a&e=1acd9bb3d6): Pike GOP Ice Cream Social
[August 23](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1f57ac234d&e=1acd9bb3d6): Randolph County Lincoln Day Dinner
[August 24](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=deec3a02a8&e=1acd9bb3d6): Hancock County Republican Party Elephant Open
[August 25](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e4fd54a581&e=1acd9bb3d6): St. Joseph County GOP Summer Picnic
---
|
---
| _**News You Can Use**_ **Governor Eric Holcomb** [ceremonially signed new law aimed at reducing diabetes](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2629e1854e&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch** [announced grants to food banks across the state](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2452bd9269&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Secretary of State Connie Lawson** [is ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=364032b82b&e=1acd9bb3d6)[working to decrease Hoosier investment fraud](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3a60f30d43&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Treasurer Kelly Mitchell**[highlights the top counties for text-to-911](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d601b2d6eb&e=1acd9bb3d6)
