clean_body: When it comes to winning an election, it's all about talking to voters. Talking to voters can happen almost anywhere...including at their doors... | | | | | | | Half a Million When it comes to winning an election, it's all about talking with voters. Talking with voters can happen almost anywhere...including at their doors and at community events. Here in Indiana, you might already be seeing the evidence of a ground game that is unprecedented in its scope and its coordination. To secure victory for our statewide and local Republican candidates in November, we have field staff and volunteers (like all of you!) out talking with voters using better technology, increased resources, and more seamless coordination between our candidates, your state party, and our partners at the Republican National Committee than ever before. And I'm excited to report that together, we have already surpassed more than half a million voter contacts so far this year (and yes, that is far outpacing the level of voter contact we're seeing from Democrats)! One way we're reaching these historic numbers is through our National Weeks of Action, like we had last weekend when more than 100 Hoosiers were out pounding the pavement -- knocking on doors and making phone calls. Keep an eye on this newsletter for news of the next National Week of Action...or to volunteer and get involved. And another way we're talking with voters is at events like the Indiana State Fair, which opened today for its 17-day run. We again have a booth at the fair, and I encourage you to stop by (we're on the north side of the fair near the Free Stage just north of the covered bridge). When you stop in, you can sign a Mike Braun for U.S. Senate sign (the county with the most signatures wins!), fill out a voter opinion survey, and grab some of your own Republican swag! Elections are won in Indiana by talking to Hoosiers. I'd help us secure victory forMike Braun, Connie Lawson, Kelly Mitchell, Tera Klutz and ourlocal Republican candidates throughout Indiana. -Kyle Photo: Last weekend, Hoosiers were busy knocking on doors and talking to Hoosiers as part of our latest National Week of Action..and they're setting new records. | | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | Step Right Up! Today, Governor Eric Holcomb was on hand to officially open the 2018 Indiana State Fair! His day started with the the annual Indiana Pork Ham Breakfast, which is organized by Indiana's pork producers (and featured some great jokes from our governor). Governor Holcomb then made stops across the fair, meeting with the Hoosiers who make the fair possible and highlighting our state's rich agricultural heritage. For 17 days, the Indiana State Fair will celebrate Indiana agriculture, all that it means for Indiana, and all that Indiana agriculture means for the world. And if you stop in, you might just seeGovernor Holcomb...and, of course, get a chance to sample some of Indiana's true State Fair delicacies. And to get you in the Indiana State Fair spirit, you'll , featuringGovernor Holcomb and several familiar Hoosier faces! | | | The Mike Braun Corner | | Braun Stops by County Fairs Summer means fair season in Indiana...and it’s not just the Indiana State Fair. Leading up to the state fair, counties throughout the state held their own fairs to celebrate agriculture and another year of 4-H success. This week, Mike Braun joined in on the fun, meeting with Hoosiers at the Vanderburgh and Morgan county fairs. Of course, while Mike Braun is spending time meeting with Hoosiers, Democrat Joe Donnelly continues to to delay taking a position on confirming Judge Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court. We know that Mike Braun is our voice...and we can’t wait to see him be elected as our next U.S. Senator this November! | | | Indiana State Fair Booth | | Join Us at the Indiana State Fair! Your Indiana Republican Party will once again have a booth at this year's Indiana State Fair! The booth, which is located near the Free Stage just north of the Covered Bridge, is open from 10 a.m. to 10 p.m. and will run the full 17 days of the fair. Stop by and sign our Mike Braun banner with your county (just like Auditor Tera Klutz did today!), and as part of a county-versus-county competition, the county with the most signatures will win! Or if you’re interested in being the face of our party at the fair, there are still opportunities to volunteer at the booth with a three-hour shift (you'll get a free ticket into the fair). Sign up , and we’ll be in touch! | | Upcoming Republican Events : St. Joseph County Victory Party : Hamilton County Meet & Greet With U.S. Senate Candidate Mike Braun : St. Joseph County Meet & Greet With U.S. Senate Candidate Mike Braun : Boone County GOP Annual Golf Scramble : Vanderburgh County Reagan Day Dinner : Harrison County Monthly Party Meeting : Ice Cream Social with Greg Pence : 27th Annual Newton County GOP Golf Outing : Kosciusko County Republican Women’s Meeting : Pike GOP Ice Cream Social : Randolph County Lincoln Day Dinner : Hancock County Republican Party Elephant Open : St. Joseph County GOP Summer Picnic | | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch Secretary of State Connie Lawson Treasurer Kelly Mitchell Auditor Tera Klutz Senator Todd Young Congresswoman Jackie Walorski Congressman Jim Banks Congressman Todd Rokita Congresswoman Susan Brooks Congressman Luke Messer Congressman Larry Bucshon Congressman Trey Hollingsworth | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | | mailto:info@indiana.gop | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | | mailto:info@indiana.gop | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc. 101 W. Ohio St., Suite 2200 Indianapolis, IN 46204 * USA

**" Super PAC run by Christie aides takes aim at Menendez"**
_New Jersey Globe, 08/02/2018_

It's never mattered more to have Democratic Senator Bob Menendez fighting for us.
[**Chip in $3 or more to help fight back.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846ca2/3af3c5d/3be4ab37/4ec398e6/1402458019/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_superpac?gpsid=5_73_2595&refcode=em18_180803_sPAC_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180803_sPAC_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=1+-+Chip+in+3+or+more+to+help+fight+back") **[DONATE](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846ca2/3af3c5d/3be4ab37/4ec398d9/1402458019/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_superpac?gpsid=5_73_2595&refcode=em18_180803_sPAC_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180803_sPAC_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=2+-+DONATE")**
Friend,

Bob Hugin was pocketing millions by price-gouging cancer patients, and was using his profits to send hundreds of thousands in political donations to help elect Donald Trump, Chris Christie, and right-wing Republicans across the country.

In total, Hugin has given Trump and Christie more than $250,000. Now their allies and former aides are propping up Hugin's campaign, attacking Bob Menendez, and misleading voters in the November election with a new super PAC.

[**Republicans are united in their effort to buy New Jersey's U.S. Senate seat. If we want to stop them, Democrats and working New Jerseyans need to be united behind Democratic Senator Bob Menendez. Show you're with him. Chip in $3 or more right now.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846ca2/3af3c5d/3be4ab37/4ec398d8/1402458019/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_superpac?gpsid=5_73_2595&refcode=em18_180803_sPAC_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180803_sPAC_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=3+-+Republicans+are+united+in+their+effort+t")

Donald Trump and Chris Christie's allies are committed to having their good friend, Bob Hugin, go to Washington to work for them instead of New Jerseyans.

They know Hugin will support Trump's tax plan, which raises taxes on New Jersey families. He'll join Trump's attacks on health care, allowing drug companies like Celgene to rip off patients even more and deny coverage to those who need it most.

And Hugin will vote to confirm right-wing judges, like Brett Kavanaugh, who will rig our system in favor of big corporations even more and take away women's rights.

[**The last thing New Jersey needs is to send another Trump Republican like Bob Hugin to Washington. We must stand together and support Senator Bob Menendez against these attacks. If you 're with him, chip in $3 or more today.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846ca2/3af3c5d/3be4ab37/4ec398db/1402458019/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_superpac?gpsid=5_73_2595&refcode=em18_180803_sPAC_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180803_sPAC_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=4+-+The+last+thing+New+Jersey+needs+is+to+se")

Thank you,

Frank

Frank Schultz
Campaign Manager
Menendez for Senate

**[Donate](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846ca2/3af3c5d/3be4ab37/4ec398da/1402458019/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_superpac?gpsid=5_73_2595&refcode=em18_180803_sPAC_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180803_sPAC_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=5+-+Donate")**

We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846ca2/3af3c5d/3be4ab37/4ec398d3/1402458019/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=menendez&utm_content=12+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=m18_180803_sPAC_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&source=m18_180803_sPAC_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx") from Menendez for Senate emails.

"" "" Friend, Bob Hugin was pocketing millions by price-gouging cancer patients, and was using his profits to send hundreds of thousands in political donations to help elect Donald Trump, Chris Christie, and right-wing Republicans across the country. In total, Hugin has given Trump and Christie more than $250,000. Now their allies and former aides are propping up Hugin's campaign, attacking Bob Menendez, and misleading voters in the November election with a new super PAC. "" Donald Trump and Chris Christie's allies are committed to having their good friend, Bob Hugin, go to Washington to work for them instead of New Jerseyans. They know Hugin will support Trump's tax plan, which raises taxes on New Jersey families. He'll join Trump's attacks on health care, allowing drug companies like Celgene to rip off patients even more and deny coverage to those who need it most. And Hugin will vote to confirm right-wing judges, like Brett Kavanaugh, who will rig our system in favor of big corporations even more and take away women's rights. "" Thank you, Frank Frank Schultz Campaign Manager Menendez for Senate "" | Paid for by Menendez for Senate Contributions or gifts to Menendez for Senate are not tax deductible. "" ""

Friend,

I wanted to take a moment and thank you personally for joining my team. Without loyal supporters like you, my work serving the people of California’s 10th district would not be possible.

As your congressman, it’s important to me that I represent your interests. Now that you’ve joined the team, I wanted to take this opportunity to get your thoughts:

What issues are most important to you? What should we prioritize as we look ahead? I want to hear from you.

I’ve put together a short survey that will help me get a clear picture of your priorities. [**Please take just a few minutes to fill it out--I promise it won’t take long to fill out.**](http://links.jeffdenham.com/u/click?_t=ae4e127997b64fdfa10e37f90fe2a78d&_m=acec0e9e5313440292d2340e7d9f5691&_e=2mYrRRLmLRspOHhLd2CUqyI7zw33pV5gEUGM_yzMEOYJVEEZdMZWZK0SP9QNSE_3wcjYaf3HdRoWpC5ZHjg7sYSm1griC8JtamcJIGG4IYLJsw8Itx-7jg5wiIiWm-oVfV_Ml5ejNAq1KpuW8HFyj_bkjlwoNu1Dl5uKEciwTocXK-NsFopPAy8dCghXvckTR6t_P1471SCpP45-e9d33u0R233iNZTWhty1hWri_jZu897g9tBXOmHwIuGqXsbymM_E3Jys_jL17ZrmUZYf2MsrDumbScrGhSUh9f3KScPm45WkPcoCSRSaUHO6DM99gQi6mmnP6ygLCtO6EBmu2e5oOetQLwOIGjuNIUeReh8M5JunAyej9rtivQpxJrw8BykYktppstjltP6_RZil7Q%3D%3D)

I’ll be reviewing the results myself and crafting policies based on your feedback, so I’m very excited to see what you have to say.

**So please,****friend******,** take a few minutes to fill out this short survey: ** **[https://jeffdenham.com/survey/](http://links.jeffdenham.com/u/click?_t=ae4e127997b64fdfa10e37f90fe2a78d&_m=acec0e9e5313440292d2340e7d9f5691&_e=2mYrRRLmLRspOHhLd2CUqyI7zw33pV5gEUGM_yzMEOYJVEEZdMZWZK0SP9QNSE_3wcjYaf3HdRoWpC5ZHjg7sYSm1griC8JtamcJIGG4IYLJsw8Itx-7jg5wiIiWm-oVfV_Ml5ejNAq1KpuW8HFyj_bkjlwoNu1Dl5uKEciwToffpmrDLHNczDucXYPKgFGEpJza-d4Kw7ZQlqh8JqON7jbVbA0h2j8Kimf90OlsA70M6uEMnRZ6CWto-qAaCGEufEAnDR5H0MLi9T4Pl0wylvGHrqkT9LknNzyK_T2ASBPWPDZVJMHnFuJqVdbcIwbwwyP-dbajnUg7ShQ55J8M01qejwwQFIkOVke0DYg41UrC5JQikQcHUXoNlANN1EA7Kf33e4Zd7LS1WB7TDGiO5g%3D%3D)**

Jeff
